known_problems: AR over 90 days growing
Insurance claim denials not consistently followed up
Recall reminders sent manually from spreadsheets
notes: Three-location group; front desk uses shared inbox for billing questions.

known_problems: Consultation-to-treatment conversion unclear
Packages sold but utilization not tracked
High no-show rate on filler appointments
notes: Owner wants clearer view of pipeline value by provider.

known_problems: Technician schedules often double-booked or underutilized
Parts delays not communicated to customers proactively
Invoices sometimes sent weeks after job completion
notes: Peak summer volume; dispatch is the main bottleneck.

known_problems: Long wait between diagnosis and first treatment slot
Patient education materials outdated
Collections handled ad hoc when plans fail
Parents cancel last minute; slots hard to refill
Treatment coordinators not aligned on follow-up scripts
Outstanding balances after insurance EOB delays
Quotes take days to send; competitors respond faster
Crew check-in/out on paper
Some clients pay Net-60 without formal credit check
notes: Growing from 12 to 25 crews this year.

known_problems: Referring dentists not consistently updated on case status
Pre-auth paperwork backlog
High-value cases with payment plans need monitoring
Membership churn after first 3 months
Retail attach rate low at checkout
Staff scheduling leaves treatment rooms idle mid-week
notes: Two rooms; owner runs social ads in-house.

known_problems: Call center books overlapping arrival windows
Technicians lack parts availability before dispatch
Warranty billing rejections pile up
notes: Franchisee; corporate mandates some tools but local ops are messy.

known_problems: High-treatment plans stall after financial presentation
Hygiene reappointment rate below target
Small AR list but persistent repeat offenders
